Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce an updated model with new constraints The user gave a dictionary with all constraint types currently only a few constraints present

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to add constraints that ensure fairness for example any FinalDecision cannot happen directly after CheckApplicantRace without a ManualReview or BiasMitigationCheck Also ensure ManualReview coexists with decisions for sensitive applicants etc

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must produce a valid Python dict Use proper structure

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Constraints In DECLARE binary constraints are mapping from source activity to target activity with support and confidence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Given a process model we can add constraints like coexistence If a decision step eg FinalDecision occurs then ManualReview must also occur in the same trace So we add a coexistence between FinalDecision and ManualReview

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Response If CheckApplicantRace occurs then BiasMitigationCheck must occur before any decision So we add a response from CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Non succession Prevent direct succession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject So add nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace Reject

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Precedence If FinalDecision occurs then ManualReview must have preceded it Could add a precedence from ManualReview to FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Chainresponse For immediate adjacency after CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck must happen next So chainresponse CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: But we should keep it reasonable

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Make sure the dictionary keys and values follow given format For unary constraints map activity name to dict with support and confidence For binary constraints map source activity to dict mapping target activity to dict with support and confidence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Better to use generic CheckSensitiveAttributes to represent any check of a sensitive attribute Then add constraints accordingly

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Also BiasMitigationCheck is a new activity ManualReview is new Approve and Reject are new decisions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to preserve original constraints

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to ensure we follow the mapping structure for each constraint type
